Black.name: Black
Black.description: Flagship combo package: 500 Mbps + 2 SIM cards with unlimited internet + TV+ (170 channels in HD/4K). One bill for everything.

Silver.name: Silver
Silver.description: Optimal combo package: 200 Mbps + 1 SIM card with unlimited internet + TV+ (120 channels). For a family of 3–4 people.

Bereke Combo.name: Bereke Combo
Bereke Combo.description: Starter combo package: 100 Mbps + 1 SIM card (20 GB) + TV Basic (80 channels).

Bereke Home.name: Bereke Home
Bereke Home.description: Reliable home internet up to 100 Mbps. Unlimited traffic, free connection.

Turbo 300.name: Turbo 300
Turbo 300.description: High-speed access up to 300 Mbps. Ideal for 4K streaming and online gaming.

Гигабит.name: Gigabit
Гигабит.description: Maximum speed up to 1 Gbps via fiber. For those who need everything at once.

ТВ Базовый.name: TV Basic
ТВ Базовый.description: 80 channels in digital quality, including Kazakh state and regional channels.

ТВ Плюс.name: TV Plus
ТВ Плюс.description: 170 HD/4K channels + 30 days of catch-up. Includes kids, sports, and movie packages.

Мобильный Старт.name: Mobile Start
Мобильный Старт.description: 10 GB internet, unlimited calls within TELECOM network. 500 minutes to other operators.

Мобильный Безлим.name: Mobile Unlimited
Мобильный Безлим.description: Unlimited mobile internet + unlimited calls across Kazakhstan. Roaming in CIS.

Бизнес Стандарт.name: Business Standard
Бизнес Стандарт.description: Up to 300 Mbps, static IP, SLA 99.5%, dedicated support line, 5 SIM cards.

Бизнес Премиум.name: Business Premium
Бизнес Премиум.description: Up to 1 Gbps, 2 static IPs, SLA 99.9%, personal manager, unlimited SIMs.

Корпоративный.name: Corporate
Корпоративный.description: Dedicated 1 Gbps channel, multisite, MPLS, SLA 99.99%, 24/7 NOC support.

speedtest_info.howItWorksDesc: We measure the speed between your device and our nearest servers in Kazakhstan. For the most accurate result, we recommend using a wired connection and disabling other downloads.
speedtest_info.ping: Ping: signal delay (the lower, the better).
speedtest_info.download: Download: speed of receiving data from the network.
speedtest_info.upload: Upload: speed of sending data to the network.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: JSC TELECOM is the national telecommunications operator of Kazakhstan. We create the country's digital infrastructure, connecting every home and every business with the modern world.

values.title: Our Values
values.reliabilityDesc: Uptime 99.9% — guaranteed connection stability 24/7 across all regions of Kazakhstan.
values.futureDesc: FTTH, 5G, IoT — we build the country's digital infrastructure and implement advanced solutions.
values.baseDesc: The largest subscriber base in Kazakhstan. Every third resident of the country is our client.
values.ecoDesc: Reducing carbon footprint, green energy, and responsible corporate governance.

cta.title: Become a TELECOM Client
cta.desc: Connect high-speed FTTH internet today and see the difference.

help.title: How can we help?
help.writeSupportDesc: Create a ticket in your dashboard, and we'll reply within 15 minutes.
help.callCenterDesc: Toll-free number for calls from mobile and landline phones in RK.
help.callMasterDesc: Apply for line diagnostics and router setup.
help.knowledgeBaseDesc: Equipment setup instructions, frequently asked questions (FAQ).
help.notFoundDesc: Our technical and financial support specialists will answer your question as soon as possible.

faqs.q: How to check balance and top up account?
faqs.a: You can check your balance in the Personal Account on the website or in the mobile application. You can top up your account with a bank card without commission directly in the 'Payment without registration' section or by going to the 'Payments' section in the Personal Account.

faqs.q: What to do if internet speed has dropped?
faqs.a: We recommend restarting your Wi-Fi router (unplug from the network for 10 seconds). Also make sure you are in an area of reliable signal reception or try connecting with a cable. If the problem persists, create a support request through the Personal Account.

faqs.q: How to transfer the contract to another person?
faqs.a: To transfer the contract, the current and new subscribers must jointly contact the nearest TELECOM subscriber office with identity cards and documents for the right of ownership of the apartment.

Basic configuration of the router provided by the provider is performed automatically by our engineers during installation. For manual configuration of details (network name, Wi-Fi password), go to the Personal Account, 'Help' section, where there is a detailed instruction for your router model.

admin.accessDeniedDesc: This section is only available to authorized system administrators.

footer.tagline: The largest telecommunications operator providing a full range of modern communication services.

internet_home.hero_title: Fiber to the home: speed you can trust
internet_home.hero_subtitle: Connect high-speed home internet from TELECOM. GPON technology ensures seamless connectivity even during peak hours.
internet_home.adv_speed_desc: Instant download of heavy files, smooth video streaming and no freezes.
internet_home.adv_security_desc: Built-in DDoS protection at the provider network level. Your data is protected.
internet_home.adv_ping_desc: Direct peering connections with major gaming servers. Play without lag.
internet_home.router_desc: When connecting home internet, we provide a modern dual-band Wi-Fi router of the 802.11ac standard completely free of charge.
internet_home.ont_desc: Optical cable is connected directly to the device (FTTH/GPON).

internet_business.hero_subtitle: Leased lines, 99.9% SLA and personal manager 24/7. Build a reliable IT infrastructure with TELECOM.
internet_business.adv_ip_desc: Providing a block of static IP addresses for your servers and video surveillance systems.
internet_business.adv_sla_desc: Financial responsibility for channel availability. Priority communication recovery.
internet_business.adv_manager_desc: A dedicated specialist to solve any technical and financial issues of your business.
internet_business.form_subtitle: Fill out the form below, and our personal manager will contact you within 15 minutes to select an individual solution.
internet_business.form_success: Request sent! A manager will contact you.

tv_digital.hero_subtitle: Over 170 channels, pause and archive function. Enjoy flawless image quality with Digital TV from TELECOM.
tv_digital.adv_content_desc: Best movies, sports and educational programs in incredible clarity.
tv_digital.adv_archive_desc: Missed your favorite show? Watch it recorded at any convenient time for up to 7 days.
tv_digital.adv_multi_desc: Watch TV on your TV, smartphone or tablet simultaneously from one account.
tv_digital.popular_subtitle: The basic TV package includes major national and world news and entertainment channels.
tv_digital.more_channels: And over 150 more TV channels for every taste...

combo.meta_desc: Combine internet, TV and mobile communications into one package.

combo.adv_saving_desc: By connecting services together, you pay significantly less than for each service separately.
combo.adv_bill_desc: All services are paid with one payment once a month. Ideal budget control.
combo.adv_status_desc: Combo subscribers receive priority 24/7 customer support service.

chatbot.title: TELECOM Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Will answer any questions
chatbot.welcome1: Hello! I am your AI assistant.
chatbot.welcome2: I will help you pick the best tariff.
chatbot.errorText: An error occurred while getting a response. Please try again.
chatbot.configError: AI configuration is not complete. Please try again later.
chatbot.serviceUnavailable: Sorry, the service is temporarily unavailable. We are already working on it.

ai_prompt.role: You are a polite AI assistant for the provider 'TELECOM'. Your task is to help customers choose an internet tariff or service package (TV+). Answer concisely and friendly.
ai_prompt.language_rule:
LANGUAGE RULE:
You must detect the user's request language. If the user writes in Kazakh, you must answer exclusively in Kazakh. If in Russian — in Russian. If in English — in English.
Current user interface language: {lang}. Use it as priority if the request language cannot be determined.
ai_prompt.instructions:
INSTRUCTIONS:
1. If asked about something unrelated to internet or provider, politely decline the topic.
2. Always try to suggest a specific tariff based on client needs (gaming, work, movies).
3. If a client asks to connect a service, explain that this can be done in the personal cabinet.

ai_recommendation.role: You are a 'TELECOM' expert. Your task is to analyze the user's speedtest results and recommend a suitable tariff from the list.
ai_recommendation.instructions:
INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Analyze if the current speed is sufficient for comfortable work.
2. If the current speed is lower than in the proposed tariffs, recommend a faster tariff.
3. If the speed is good, praise the user's choice or offer a tariff with additional bonuses (TV+).
4. Answer concisely (2-3 sentences), friendly and professionally.
5. Do NOT use Markdown, plain text only.
ai_recommendation.prompt_base: Give a recommendation based on my results: {download} Mbps.
